error: Something went wrong, please try again later

auth.welcome-back: Welcome back. Sign in to keep listening.
auth.create-prompt: Create an account to save tracks and build playlists.

error.username-chars: Use letters, numbers, dots, underscores or hyphens.
error.password-length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Update your profile, avatar and password.
settings.privacy-profile-hint: Let anyone view your profile and public playlists.
settings.privacy-listening-hint: Followers see your current track in their friends rail.
settings.privacy-history-hint: Recent plays appear in followers' activity feed.

search.placeholder: What do you want to play?
search.empty: Type a song, artist, or album to start searching.
search.error: Couldn't reach the catalog. Please try again.

playlist.cover-too-large: File must be smaller than 5 MB.
playlist.label: Playlist

player.empty: Pick a track to start listening
player.queue-empty: Add tracks to your queue from a row, album, or search.

home.empty-recommendations: Listen to a few tracks and we'll tailor this to you.

coming-soon.hint: This area is part of the upcoming roadmap. The shell, theming, and tokens are already in place.

library.title: Your Library
library.signed-out-hint: Sign in to access your saved tracks, albums, and playlists.
library.empty-playlists: You haven't created any playlists yet.
library.empty-albums: You haven't saved any albums yet.
library.empty-artists: You aren't following any artists yet.
library.empty-liked: Tap the heart on any track to save it here.

social.friend-activity-empty: Follow people who listen publicly to see what they're playing here.

marketing.title: Preview of Spotify
marketing.subtitle: Sign up to enjoy unlimited music and podcasts. We'll show you the occasional ad — but you'll keep using the service for free!

guest.podcasts-title: Let's find some podcasts to follow
guest.podcasts-sub: We'll keep you updated on new episodes.

body.intro: Spotify is a music platform that helps millions of listeners discover tracks, artists and podcasts. This page outlines the terms that apply to all accounts.
body.terms: By creating an account or using Spotify, you agree to our community guidelines, free-tier policy, and content distribution limits. The full text is published here as it evolves.
body.contact: Have a question? Reach the support team via the Help section in your profile settings. We aim to respond within three business days.

safety.intro: Listener safety is our priority. We secure sessions with modern encryption and keep your data inside our infrastructure.
safety.report: If you spot suspicious activity or harmful content, report it from your account page. Every report is reviewed by our moderation team.
safety.controls: Privacy settings let you hide your profile, disable public listening history, and control what friends see in their activity feed.

privacy.intro: We only collect what we need to run the player: your preferences, playback history, and follow lists.
privacy.data: Data is stored on our servers and never shared with third parties without consent. Audio is streamed directly from partner providers and is never persisted on our side.
privacy.rights: You can request an export or deletion of your data through the settings. Requests are processed within 30 days.

cookies.intro: Spotify uses cookies to keep you signed in, remember your language and theme preferences.
cookies.types: Cookies fall into three groups: essential (required to run), functional (remember preferences), and analytical (help us improve the service).
cookies.manage: You can clear cookies any time through your browser. Essential cookies will be re-created on your next visit.

ads.intro: Free accounts hear short ad breaks between tracks. Ads keep the service running and the catalog growing.
ads.choices: Premium subscribers enjoy ad-free playback and full offline access. You can subscribe or cancel any time from the account page.

accessibility.intro: Spotify is built to be accessible to everyone: every interactive element is keyboard-friendly and announced by screen readers.
accessibility.standards: The interface follows WCAG 2.1 AA: visible focus rings, sufficient contrast, and `prefers-reduced-motion` support are part of the design system.
accessibility.feedback: If something does not work the way you expect, let us know — we want Spotify to remain comfortable for every listener.
